title: Quality of Craft
description: A Minecraft datapack that adds some quality of life features to the game.
body:
Quality of Craft was made to add quality of life features to the game.

- Leaves - All leaves now drop apples, and percentages have been increased.
- Craftable Chainmail Armor - Use chains for the crafting recipe to get a set of Chainmail Armor.
- Craftable Name Tags - Use Quartz, String, and a Glowing Item Frame.
- Useful Rotten Flesh - Combine Rotten Flesh and String to get leather.
- Useful Rabbit Hide - Rabbit Hide can now be used to make Books and Item Frames
- Improved Mobs Drops - Mob Drops have been adjusted.
  - Wither Skeleton - Wither Skeletons drop skulls more often.
  - Enderman - Endermen now drop pearls 90% of the time, and Looting increases the count. Endermen can also rarely drop Chorus Fruits.
  - Drowned - Drowned can now drop Nautilus Shells even if they aren’t holding them. If a Drowned is holding a Trident, it will now drop a Trident on death with a 70% rate.
  - Witch - Witches can now drop one of seven Potions and can drop Slimeballs.
- More Loot Chest Drops - Some chests have been adjusted.
  - Slime Balls can be found in Jungle Temple chests.
- Revealed Hidden Advancements - All hidden advancements can now be seen on the advancements tab.
- Added Bundles (1.20 and Below) - Bundles can be crafted using String and Leather or Rabbit Hide.
Music Discs - The different music discs can be found throughout structures.
  - Blocks - Village Weaponsmith and Toolsmith
  - Chirp - Jungle Temple and Ruined Portal
  - Stal - Abandoned Mineshaft
  - Mellohi - Buried Treasure
  - Wait - Buried Treasure
  - Mall - Igloo and Jungle Temple
  - Strad - Desert Pyramid
  - Ward - Nether Fortress
  - Far - Stronghold
- Turtle Scutes - Throw a brush onto a turtle to get a bunch of Turtle Scutes. Turtle Scutes can also be found in Shipwreck chests.
- Craftable Saddles - Saddles can be crafted with leather, string, and iron ingots.
